title: ANALYZE: Adaptive folder cognition and Librarian role lifecycle

implementation_cluster.title: IMPLEMENT: Complete cognition librarian lifecycle wiring and adaptive coverage policy

children.title: Create .polaris/cognition/ staging directory structure and gitignore entry
Extend CompactReturn with work_note_paths and update worker to write cognition notes
Wire dispatchCognitionLibrarian into loop continue after each child
Define and implement adaptive folder cognition coverage policy

key_findings: dispatchCognitionLibrarian is fully implemented in src/cognition/librarian-dispatch.ts but never called from loop/continue.ts
CompactReturn lacks work_note_paths — POL-252 commit was empty
workers still use deprecated direct-write pattern (applyRouteCognitionDelta/applySummaryDelta)
.polaris/cognition/ directory does not exist — POL-250 commit was empty
POL-249 cluster children POL-250, POL-251, POL-252 had empty or partial commits despite Done status in Linear
Two distinct librarian roles must remain separate: SmartDocs Librarian (docs promotion) vs Cognition Librarian (folder cognition reconciliation)
Adaptive coverage policy is missing — only reactive skip rules exist
POL-161 and POL-171 can proceed with acceptable risk; retroactive reconciliation recommended after POL-286

risks.pol_161: MEDIUM — distributed bootstrap workers will accumulate unreviewed direct-write cognition; addressable via retroactive reconciliation after POL-286
risks.pol_171: MEDIUM-HIGH — map pruning/tombstoning creates orphaned cognition surfaces; audit src/map/ POLARIS.md before execution
